findings.problem: Binder contacts divergent patch and channel interior but leaves entrance mouth wide open. Substrates can still enter the channel.

conservation_analysis.note: Loop extensions ONLY target ERAP2-unique residues to preserve selectivity

v2_southcap.rationale: Closest bridge: binder res 14 -> ERAP2 406 at 8.8A, needs 4-residue loop

v2_northcap.rationale: Closest bridge: binder res 25 -> ERAP2 353 at 10.4A, needs 5-residue loop

v2_dualcap.insert: RNSF at pos 14-15 + ENYGS at pos 29-30
v2_dualcap.targets: Both south and north rim contacts
v2_dualcap.rationale: Maximum entrance coverage, both ERAP2-unique clusters

next_steps: 1. Run 9 Boltz-2 predictions on GPU (3 variants x 3 targets, 3 diffusion samples each)
3. Re-run SASA capping analysis on best variant CIF
4. If entrance SASA reduction > 80%: channel capped selectively
5. If selectivity breaks: remove offending loop contacts, redesign
